evals.prompt: Create guidance for setting up a new TUnit test project on Microsoft.Testing.Platform with the correct project shape, package references, runner behavior, and first smoke test. Identify the package files to consult.
assertions: Routes package installation and project shape through foundation guidance.
Keeps the guidance TUnit-specific and hands broad .NET project concerns to martix-dotnet-csharp only when needed.

evals.prompt: Review a TUnit test suite that uses matrix data, shared class data, Before and After hooks, dependency injection, and parallel execution controls. Identify likely risks and route to the minimum rule set.
assertions: Routes data sources through data rules and maps.
Routes hooks and DI through lifecycle rules.
Calls out parallel-by-default behavior and uses NotInParallel, DependsOn, or limiters only when justified.

evals.prompt: Plan moving a mixed xUnit/NUnit/MSTest suite to TUnit while preserving test behavior, assertion intent, lifecycle setup, and CI reporting. Classify model tier and split the work for parallel agents.
assertions: Treats the initial framework comparison and migration plan as premium or mixed tier.
Uses the framework comparison rule and migration attribute matrix before proposing edits.
Splits follow-up implementation by test project, feature area, or framework source to keep worktree changes isolated.
